name: Gradient Intelligence
summary: Luminous AI/product system with restrained gradients, smooth cards, low-weight display type, and modern launch energy.

style_dna.philosophy: Advanced but legible: gradient energy should clarify momentum, not hide structure.
style_dna.visual_signature: Soft luminous background, glassy panels, purple/blue/aurora accent, and thin-weight hero type.
style_dna.surface_logic: White base with gradient hero wash and pale lavender panels.

palette.accent_policy: Use gradients as one controlled field or edge glow, not everywhere.
palette.semantic_policy: Avoid semantic color overload; let gradient own the emotional range.

layout.grid: Large hero statement with floating product evidence cards.
layout.whitespace: Airy, launch-page pacing with strong focal hierarchy.
layout.image_treatment: Abstract AI visuals, product UI cards, or generated texture as background only.

components.buttons: Gradient or solid purple pill, soft secondary.
components.cards: Light translucent panels with subtle border and roomy padding.
components.tables: Use only for feature matrices; keep rows spacious.
components.callouts: Luminous highlight panels with one concise claim.

slides.accent_rule: Use gradients as a controlled background or hero accent, not as decoration everywhere.
slides.background_css: radial-gradient(circle at 12% 18%, rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.22), transparent 30%), radial-gradient(circle at 84% 8%, rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.16), transparent 28%), #ffffff

document.heading_rule: Keep documents printable; translate gradients into accent rules and pale section fills.

source_inheritance.method: Synthesized from local getdesign.md working corpus.

do: Use thin-weight display type with structured panels.
Keep gradients behind content, not inside body text.
dont: Do not make every surface gradient.
Do not sacrifice readability for glow.
Do not use generic purple blobs.

pptx: Use deterministic HTML/CSS or PPTX text boxes for final text.
Keep one core idea per slide and validate rendered PNG dimensions.
docx: Translate visual style into Word typography, margins, heading hierarchy, tables, and callouts.
Keep documents printable unless the user explicitly requests PDF-only visual art direction.
carousel: Use high-resolution fixed canvas, mobile-readable text, and safe margins.
Make each frame complete enough to stand alone.
